prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、 双一流；软科主榜2026年约第60名，近年排名从2021年第43名逐步下降至第60名左右，整体处于中上211水平；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端 事件（院长论文造假等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第48（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；社会学A、世界史A-，仅2个A-及以上 学科，优势学科数量较少，但社会学与该校人文社科大类招生专业直接关联，对文科类考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业为高热推荐 ，与该校电气类、电子信息类招生专业对应，可能吸引理科高分考生；本省2026年考生总数约37.79万，较2025年（约28.57万）大幅增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；上海大学位于上海，对云南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在本省招生占比约3.3%（2021年），属跨省招生中等 水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划小幅扩招（5.5%）、本省考生大幅增加（约32%）、学校负面声誉及软科排名下降趋势，在2025年基准6790名基础上预计竞争总体加 剧，结合考生规模激增及声誉因素小幅上调，预测最低位次约7093名，区间6593–7593名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 6842 → 7815 → 6609 → 6740 → 6790, fluctuating within the 6600–7800 range in recent years, with a baseline of about 6790 in 2025 and relatively stable rankings in the past 3 years; the provincial enrollment plan for science/physics category was 88 in 2021 → 77 in 2022 → 77 in 2023 → 77 in 2024 → 73 in 2025, with a plan of 77 in 2026, an expansion of about 5.5% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a gradual decline from 43rd in 2021 to around 60th in recent years, overall at an upper-middle 211 level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (dean paper fraud, etc.), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 48th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; Sociology A, World History A-, only 2 A- and above disciplines, with a relatively small number of advantageous disciplines, but Sociology is directly related to the university's humanities and social sciences major enrollment, attracting some liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, etc., are highly recommended hot majors, corresponding to the university's Electrical and Electronic Information major categories, potentially attracting high-scoring science candidates; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700), sharply intensifying competition; Shanghai University is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal to Yunnan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in the province is about 3.3% (2021), at a medium level of cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (5.5%), a significant increase in provincial candidates (about 32%), the university's negative reputation, and the declining Soft Science ranking, based on the 2025 baseline of 6790, competition is expected to intensify overall. Combined with the surge in candidate numbers and reputation factors, a slight upward adjustment is made, predicting a minimum ranking of about 7093, with a range of 6593–7593.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6593–7593, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 Economics Category/Management Science and Engineering Category, with Tier 1 Electronic Information Category/Electrical Category as a sprint (requiring rankings better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 Materials Category as a safety option. Note that Shanghai University enrolls by major categories, with major selection at the end of the first academic year, so attention should be paid to the popularity changes of each major.
